# Scoped Rule: Generated Code Protection

**Scope**: All generated files and code generation outputs

## What This Protects

Prevents accidental edits to generated code that would be overwritten on regeneration.

## Patterns

### DO NOT EDIT Generated Files

Generated files are clearly marked. Do not modify them:

```
@unrdf/otel/src/generated/     # OTel semconv (weaver-generated)
packages/*/dist/               # Build outputs
*.generated.*                  # Generated by convention
```

### Edit Source, Not Output

- **Wrong**: Edit `@unrdf/otel/src/generated/spans.ts`
- **Right**: Regenerate via `pnpm --filter @unrdf/otel exec weaver registry generate`

### Generation Entry Points

| Tool | Generates | Command |
|------|-----------|---------|
| weaver | OTel semconv | `weaver registry generate` |
| template-renderer | Code from templates | `pnpm cli template render` |
| codegen | RDF-based code | `pnpm cli codegen` |

## Verification

After any generation work:
- [ ] Source changes committed
- [ ] Generated files regenerated
- [ ] Git status shows NO changes to generated files (except timestamp comments)
